index.title: Campaigns
index.description: Each campaign groups a client's tickets.

emptyState.noneDescription: Create your first campaign to organize the agency's work.
emptyState.filteredDescription: Adjust the filters to see campaigns.

form.description: Group tickets under one of a client's campaigns.
form.name: Name

emptyFiltered.title: No tickets match the filters
emptyFiltered.description: Adjust or clear the filters to see more of this campaign's tickets.

emptyNone.title: No tickets in this campaign
emptyNone.description: Create this campaign's first ticket to start production.

plan.reviewOrApplyRemoval: Review in the chat or apply — includes removing a ticket.
plan.reviewOrApply: Review in the chat or apply it to the campaign.
plan.reviewOrApplyCreate: Review in the chat or apply to create the tickets.

strategy.title: Plan content with AI
strategy.description: Describe the content strategy. The strategist builds the tickets already scheduled, with estimated tasks.
strategy.emptyHint: E.g. “1 reel and 2 carousels per week, starting next week.” Tell it the cadence and the period (a month, a campaign, ongoing…) — the strategist pulls the rest from the client's context.
strategy.additiveHint: The new tickets appear dimmed next to the existing ones in the list. Review and add them below.
strategy.fullHint: The proposed tickets appear in the campaign list (dimmed). Review and click approve below.
strategy.applied: Plan applied — watch the tickets appear in the campaign.
strategy.composerPlaceholder: Reply to the strategist…  (Enter sends · Shift+Enter for a new line)

requireApproval.title: Require client approval
requireApproval.description: GO pauses in Production and the client receives the approval link by email.

autoPublish.title: Publish after approval
autoPublish.description: Once every creative is approved, the post is scheduled automatically.

scope.title: Send scope to client
scope.description: Emails a summary of the campaign's tickets (names, types and dates) — no internal details.
scope.recipientsHint: Up to 4 emails. Press Enter or comma to add.

finalize.title: Finish campaign?
finalize.description: We'll wrap up the campaign and generate the audit report with a summary of the production.

delete.title: Delete campaign?
delete.description: This removes the campaign and all of its tickets. This action cannot be undone.

bulkDelete.description: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. The tickets and all of their content (subtasks, creatives, posts) will be removed.

sendScope.hint: Up to 4 emails. Press Enter or comma to add.
